mapper.select: select key_id, user_id, key_name, api_key, key_prefix, permissions, expires_at, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from api_key where user_id = #{userId}
select key_id, user_id, key_name, api_key, key_prefix, permissions, expires_at, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from api_key where key_id = #{keyId}
select key_id, user_id, key_name, api_key, key_prefix, permissions, expires_at, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from api_key where api_key = #{apiKey} and is_enabled = 1
mapper.insert: insert into api_key (user_id, key_name, api_key, key_prefix, permissions, expires_at, is_enabled, create_at) values (#{userId}, #{keyName}, #{apiKey}, #{keyPrefix}, #{permissions}, #{expiresAt}, #{isEnabled}, #{createAt})
mapper.update: update api_key set key_name=#{keyName}, permissions=#{permissions}, expires_at=#{expiresAt}, is_enabled=#{isEnabled}, update_at=#{updateAt} where key_id = #{keyId}
